name: Budget Optimization
description: Agent must maintain perfect balance across 5 allocation channels using limited budget.
input: State vector with 5 equal channels [0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5] and 0.5 remaining budget.
expected_output: Distribute exactly one allocate action (2) across all 5 indices symmetrically.
evaluation_criteria: Fractional similarity to perfect balance (1 action per index).
